# FM module card name slot: display-name binding with provenance/assent trail

## Context

B-split of #14598 (horizon map v2): the card's name slot as its own leaf — the ADR 0032 §2.3.2 primitive: the social name renders as **mutable display state over the durable id**, WITH its provenance/assent trail reachable, never as a key.

## The Fix

The triplet, module placement per `#14577`: (1) the NameSlot unit — binds the DTO fallback chain (`displayName → name → githubUsername → id`, per `fleetCockpitStatus.mjs`), renders the provenance affordance (the naming-layer trail when #11240-class data is wired; declared-proxy until then), mono-id fallback; (2) unit specs — every fallback step renders, a rename re-renders IN PLACE (instance stable — the §2.3.2 fixture), null-everything → mono id; (3) NL-verified row on live roster data.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Fallback chain per the merged DTO order (CARD-CONTRACT row, 1:1).
- [ ] Rename-in-place fixture green (no re-key).
- [ ] Provenance affordance present (wired or declared-proxy — honest either way).
- [ ] Tokens only; custom-config specs + NL-verified.

## Out of Scope

Card composition (#14598, narrowed) · the naming-layer data plumbing (#11240 orbit).

## Related

Epic #14560 (parent) · split-of #14598 · CARD-CONTRACT (PR #14627) · ADR 0032 §2.3.2 · merged DTO.

Sweeps: current window; no equivalent; A2A clean. Structure-map: N/A.
